boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy STD-RAV-072-P requires payment release approval to be closed before release, even if other items are matched.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states 'payment release approval remains open', directly contradicting the policy's requirement for closure.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The 'payment release approval open' dependency remains unresolved and blocks timely action execution.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 confirms that 'payment release approval remains open,' directly violating policy STD-RAV-072-P. This unresolved dependency, despite other items being matched, means the source boundary is not closed. The visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 further supports this open state, preventing invoice release.
open_blockers: visible hold fixation vs closeout-ledger binding
